seo.metaTitle: Area Code Phone Numbers | Dialpad - Get Local Numbers
seo.metaDescription: Discover local area code phone numbers for your business with Dialpad. Get numbers in popular area codes. Start building your local presence today.
seo.targetAudience: SMBs and startups across various industries (tech, retail, professional services) looking to establish a local presence and improve customer communication.
seo.competitorSentence: Unlike competitors, Dialpad offers a complete cloud-based communication platform with area code phone numbers and advanced features.

hero.h1: Win Every Customer Moment with SalamTalk AI Pro
hero.subtitle: The AI-powered phone system that brings calls, texts, and contacts together. Respond faster, capture every opportunity, and never lose revenue to a missed call.

containers.title: Unified Customer Context
containers.description: All calls, texts, voicemails, and recordings in one place. See the complete customer history so your team always has full context.
containers.painPoint: Say goodbye to scattered communication—everything's in one dashboard.

containers.title: Smart Proactive Intelligence
containers.description: AI SMS Drafting and Smart Virtual Concierge that understands intent. Route calls perfectly, first time, every time.
containers.painPoint: Eliminate routing chaos with machines that learn your business.

containers.title: 24/7 AI Receptionist (Sona)
containers.description: Your AI agent answers calls when you're sleeping, picks up after-hours inquiries, qualifies leads. Always on. Always responsive.
containers.painPoint: Never miss a customer—even at 2 AM on a Sunday.

h2_clarity.title: Bring Order to Communication Chaos
h2_clarity.description: Stop losing revenue to scattered conversations and missed context.

h3_items.heading: One Dashboard for All Channels
h3_items.content: Calls, texts, CRM, and contacts—unified so your team stops hunting across five different apps. Find any customer conversation instantly.

h3_items.heading: Shared Team Visibility
h3_items.content: Your diverse customer base often highlights the need for seamless handoffs. SalamTalk lets your team see who's working on what and step in immediately when needed.

h3_items.heading: Automatic AI Organization
h3_items.content: Note-taking, summaries, and AI-powered call tags work 24/7 so your team focuses on customers, not busywork.

h3_items.heading: Real-Time Collaboration
h3_items.content: Share context behind the scenes, loop in the right teammate, and deliver faster responses. Customers notice responsiveness.

h2_speed.title: Win Hearts with Your Responsiveness
h2_speed.description: Speed is a competitive advantage. SalamTalk AI Pro makes your team unstoppable.

h3_items.heading: Shared Numbers for Instant Handoffs
h3_items.content: Assign tasks, share context, route intelligently. No more 'wrong person' calls. Your team moves at customer speed.

h3_items.heading: 24/7 AI Agent That Never Sleeps
h3_items.content: Sona handles common questions, qualifies leads, and routes to humans when needed. Your business never stops responding.

h3_items.heading: Smart Integrations Across Your Stack
h3_items.content: Syncs with HubSpot, Salesforce, Zapier, and Make so your calls, texts, and data stay perfectly in sync. Use our API for custom workflows too.

h3_items.heading: Proactive Workflow Automation
h3_items.content: AI SMS Drafting, auto-summaries, and intelligent tagging mean your team spends zero time on admin.

h2_control.title: Scale Your Business with Confidence
h2_control.description: Custom workflows and intelligent oversight designed for growing teams.

h3_items.heading: Phone Menu & Routing That Fits Your Flow
h3_items.content: Set up call routing by team, schedule, or priority. Calls reach the right person every single time—automatically.

h3_items.heading: Build Custom Connections with Our API
h3_items.content: Create integrations that fit your specific processes. SalamTalk AI Pro adapts to you, not the other way around.

h3_items.heading: Real-Time Analytics & Oversight
h3_items.content: See what's working and what's not. Identify trouble spots early, leave feedback directly in SalamTalk, and guide your team to success.

h3_items.heading: Quick Team Performance Review
h3_items.content: Track activity, trends, and conversion rates across teammates and numbers. Scale confidently knowing exactly what's happening.

faq.title: Common Questions About SalamTalk AI Pro

items.question: How long does it take to set up SalamTalk AI Pro?
items.answer: Start talking to customers in minutes. We offer free number porting from your existing carrier, so you can switch without downtime or hassle. No credit card required for the free trial.

items.question: Can I use my existing phone number?
items.answer: Absolutely. We handle free number porting for you. Your current number, your customers' expectations—everything stays the same while you gain AI-powered benefits.

items.question: How does the AI Receptionist (Sona) actually work?
items.answer: Sona answers calls 24/7, qualifies leads, and transfers to humans when needed. You set the rules—what questions it answers, when to escalate. It learns your business, not the other way around.

items.question: What if I need custom integrations?
items.answer: Use our API to build exactly what you need. We also integrate with HubSpot, Salesforce, Zapier, Make, and 500+ other tools. Flexible, not factory-fit.

items.question: Is my customer data secure?
items.answer: Enterprise-grade encryption, AICPA SOC 2 certified, and compliance with GDPR, CCPA, and industry standards. Your data is protected like you'd expect from a platform trusted by 90,000+ businesses.

cta.title: Stop Losing Revenue to Missed Calls and Scattered Communication
cta.description: Experience the difference AI-powered business intelligence makes. Free setup, free number porting, free 14-day trial.
cta.guarantee: No credit card required. Full access to all features. Start in minutes.
